# WhisperShortcut 7.5

## Installation

Download the latest build from [Releases](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases).

## Changes

### Documentation cleanup

- **Removed obsolete Google verification plan**: Cleaned up an active planning document that is no longer needed after the Google OAuth verification work.
